form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr6) over 2130m at this track, beaten 6 m by Heavy Metal Hammer (2:37.70) in 4yo+ NR up to 59 on April 7 at $7.50. Before that, a good run when 3rd (Fr5) over 1730m at this track, beaten 2.75 m by Salsawithsierra (2:05.50) in 4yo+ NR 49 to 55 on March 31 at $10. Rates highly. Expected to be in the finish again.

form.formComment: Backs up three days after he failed to impress 9th (Fr3) over 1780m after being wide early at Northam, beaten 15 m by American Typhoon (2:11.80) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on April 11 at $16. form.formComment: Resumes today. At the latest first-up run surrendered the lead and finished 4th (Sr3) over 2185m after being wide early at Pinjarra, beaten 15 m by Kingseat (2:41.00) in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on April 7 2025 at $12. Might need this run and others rate better.

form.formComment: Only had 3 starts last preparation. Returned to racing with a handy win by a nose as favourite (Sr2) at this track (2:41.10) beating From Tigerland in 4yo+ MAIDEN on March 24 at $2.30. Will be better for that run and expected to be in the finish again.
